mdSummary:
# Sheet

Slide-in side panel from left/right/top/bottom.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/sheet

## Parameters

| Sheet | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Sheet | Open | `bool` | `` |  |

| Sheet | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| Sheet | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| SheetClose | Context | `Sheet.SheetContext` | `default!` |  |
| SheetClose | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| SheetClose | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SheetClose | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

| SheetContent | Side | `SheetSide` | `SheetSide.Right` |  |
| SheetContent | Size | `SheetSize` | `SheetSize.Default` |  |
